_comment: Canonical, machine-readable keyword taxonomy. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for classify.py and apply_keywords.py. docs/keywords.md is the human-readable rendering - keep them in sync. Hierarchical: a category with 'children' is a theme; the classifier selects the most specific CHILD (or a standalone keyword). The parent keyword itself is written only when apply_keywords is run with --with-parents. A photo may match multiple keywords, or NONE (empty result is valid).

children.definition: Wide natural scenery with no single dominant feature - mountains, hills, fields, forests, deserts, valleys.
excludes: nature/water if a body of water dominates
nature/plants for a close-up of one plant

children.definition: A body of water is the dominant subject.
excludes: nature/landscape if land/forest dominates and water is incidental
nature/sky if the sky dominates over the water

children.definition: A plant, flower, or foliage shown as the subject (typically close-up).
excludes: food for produce as a dish/ingredient

children.definition: The sky itself is the clear dominant subject - little ground/foreground subject.
excludes: nature/landscape or nature/water when a landscape/seascape shares the frame meaningfully
examples: a sky of color at dusk

children.definition: An animal is the subject - pets, wildlife, birds, insects, livestock.
excludes: food if the animal is plated as a meal

children.definition: Streetscapes and cityscapes - the built environment at scene scale.
excludes: urban/architecture when ONE building/detail is the subject

children.definition: A single building, monument, bridge, or architectural detail presented as the subject.
Real-world artworks photographed in place: paintings, sculptures, murals, installations.
examples: a painting on a gallery wall

children.definition: Drawn or digital 2D artwork that is not anime/manga and not game imagery.
Anime or manga-style artwork or characters.
examples: an anime pilot in a cockpit

children.definition: Video-game imagery: screenshots, key art, in-game scenes.

categories.definition: Prepared food, dishes, drinks, or ingredients shown as the subject.
Text- or UI-dominant captures: app/website screenshots, paperwork, signs, whiteboards.
excludes: art/physical for posters valued as artwork
